intentionally not modified to keep Slice D's regression boundary.

Record an operator decision for a pending MCP tool call.

Body: ``{"decision": "approve" | "reject", "remember_for_run": bool}``.

get.description:
List MCP servers with masked env / headers. Optional filter by

schema.title: Response Delete Api Mcp Servers Server Id

get.description:
Detect raw-secret-shaped env / header entries on a server.

Returns masked values only — the raw plaintext never crosses this
boundary. Caller (frontend installed-view banner) uses the result to
show a migration prompt; the actual move happens via the POST
``/migrate-env-to-refs`` endpoint below.

schema.title: Response Get Api Mcp Servers Server Id Legacy Env

post.description:
Move raw env / header values into env_refs / header_refs.

Body schema:
    {
      "mapping": {"<env_key>": "<credential_id>", ...},
      "confirm_remove_raw": true
    }

Validation:
- Every credential_id in ``mapping`` must exist + be enabled.
- Every ``env_key`` in ``mapping`` must currently exist in either
  ``stdio.env`` or ``http.headers`` of the target server.
- ``confirm_remove_raw`` must be exactly ``true`` (plan §6: "never
  auto-migrate"). The frontend's migration modal flips this only on
  the user's explicit click.

Effects:
- Adds ``mapping[env_key] -> credential_id`` to ``env_refs`` (stdio)
  or ``header_refs`` (http).
- Removes the corresponding ``env_key`` from ``env`` / ``headers``.
- Increments fingerprint via the standard update path (v2 includes
  env_refs / header_refs keys, M4).
- Triggers reverse-index rebuild on the binding index.

schema.title: Response Post Api Mcp Servers Server Id Migrate Env To Refs

post.description:
Open a fresh session, list_tools, close session. Refreshes cache.

get.description: List stable capability metadata exposed to the frontend.

post.description: Send user query + context to configured LLM and return the answer.

get.description:
List known LLM model options. Optionally filter by provider.

**Deprecated** (S6, 2026-05-15) — kept for backward compatibility.
Prefer `/api/chat/models/discover` for runtime discovery.

Auto-discover models from an OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

Tries GET /v1/models to discover available models.
Works with Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, LocalAI, third-party aggregators
(newapi, OneAPI, OpenRouter, SiliconFlow, etc.).

URL-derivation rules (matching cc-switch's build_models_url):
  - "https://api.x.com" -> "https://api.x.com/v1/models"
  - "https://api.x.com/v1" -> "https://api.x.com/v1/models"
  - "https://api.x.com/v1/chat/completions" -> "https://api.x.com/v1/models"
  - trailing slash tolerated

List all supported LLM providers with their models.

**Deprecated** (S6, 2026-05-15) — kept for backward compatibility.
Prefer `/api/chat/config` + Settings-driven backend resolution for
new clients. See `docs/plans/active/2026-05-13-settings-unified-api-config-plan.md` §S6.

Opt §6: aggregate roll-up of the candidate store.

All values are derived from COUNT / GROUP BY queries; no raw
candidate text (claim / title / future_use / source_summary) is
surfaced. `recent_decisions` carries up to `recent_decision_limit`
most-recent non-empty `decision_reason` strings (truncated to
240 chars each), which are only ever written by service / curator
/ promoter code — never by user input — so they are safe to expose
to an operator audit panel.

List candidates with optional scoping filters.

`total` is the pagination-independent filter cardinality (S8.1 fix);
previously it was len(items) which mislead frontend pagination when
`limit < matching_rows`.

post.description:
Promote an ACCEPTED candidate to MemPalace or skill draft proposal.

Returns 404 if the candidate doesn't exist. Returns 409 when the
candidate isn't in a promotable state, the kill switch is off, or the
underlying MemPalace adapter rejects the write — the candidate row
stays at its current status in that case (no partial promotion).

Capture a candidate from a manual source (test / backfill).

Inspiration / discussion / runtime-job capture endpoints belong to Slice 3-4
and are not yet registered.

Run one curator pass (Slice 7).

No-op (returns enabled=false) when `evolution.curator_enabled` is off.
Otherwise sweeps PENDING candidates for stale + low-confidence
transitions and surfaces conflict + dedupe groups as report-only data.
Reviewers act on conflicts through the regular accept/reject/snooze
endpoints — the curator never auto-resolves.

get.description:
Read-only health snapshot for pipeline-adjacent state.

Plan v2 §13.1d.1: exposes generation pool's ``primary_key_active``,
``credentials_in_cooldown``, ``last_failure_class`` so a release gate
or monitoring view can flag a degraded run without reading log files.

Plan v2 §13.1d.2: includes ``exhausted_count`` per category — any
value >0 in a single eval run is a release-blocker signal upstream.

Response shape::

    {
      "keypool": {"pools": [{"category": "generation", ...}, ...]},
      "task_cache": {"size": N, "retention_seconds": ..., "max_cache": ...}
    }

No secrets in the response. Endpoint never raises; failure to read
the pool is encoded as ``keypool.disabled`` with a reason field.
Return async task status by task ID.

get.description:
Get chunked document content for a project (for smarter RAG context).

Returns chunks instead of full documents, allowing the frontend to
send only relevant chunks to the LLM.

Chunk search with optional query-driven pre-ingestion.

- ingest_mode=none: pure retrieval on existing chunks
- ingest_mode=query: ingest only query-relevant pending files
- ingest_mode=full: ingest all pending files before retrieval

parameters.description: 返回最相关的 N 个chunk
parameters.name: top_k

schema.description: 返回最相关的 N 个chunk
schema.title: Top K

parameters.description: query 模式最多入库候选文件数
parameters.name: ingest_limit

schema.description: query 模式最多入库候选文件数
schema.title: Ingest Limit

get.description:
Resolve a chunk_id to {material_id, chunk_id, page, chunk_index}.

Read-only over the existing chunk store. Returns:
  - 200 with the locator dict on success.
  - 404 when chunk_id is not present in the project chunk store.
  - 422 when project_id is missing or blank (FastAPI Query validation).

schema.title: Response Get Resources Chunks Chunk Id Locator

post.description:
Scan the project's source_folder and ingest all literature files.

Reads all supported files (.pdf, .docx, .doc, .txt, .md) from the project's
source_folder and indexes them into the knowledge base.  Already-indexed
files (same filename) are skipped.  Returns a summary of what was processed.
